native_form.query: SELECT TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE")) AS "SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE", SUM("source"."HABIT_ACHIEVED_USERS") AS "sum", SUM("source"."TOTAL_SUBSCRIBED_USERS") AS "sum_2" FROM (select * from analytics_prod.dbt_viz.VIZ_HABIT_MOMENT_ACHIEVED) AS "source" GROUP BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE")) ORDER BY TO_DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP_LTZ("source"."SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE")) ASC
